productDisplayName: Arrow Sport Men Solid Black Sweaters
description: CompositionBlack V-neck sweater made of 100% cotton, has a ribbed neck with white tipping, sleeveless with ribbed armholes that have white tipping, moss stitch knit in the front and flat knit at the back, embroidered brand collection on the left chest and a ribbed hem with white tippingFitting Regular   Wash care Gentle machine wash with cold water using a non-chlorine detergentWash dark colours separately Do not bleach or wringTumble dry lowDry inside out in shadeMedium heat steam iron do not iron on decorationsEnjoy the winter chill this year in this absolutely warm black sweater from arrow. The cotton fabric keeps you feeling warm and comfortable all day long. Layer this over t-shirts or shirts, and jeans.Model statistics The model wears size M in sweatersHeight: 6', Shoulders: 18"
